claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Consistency log present with no blocking inconsistencies
claim_audit_results.source_ref: part_b_assembled_draft.json consistency_log (12 entries CC-01 to CC-12); CC-06 and CC-09 carry status=inconsistency_flagged
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: CC-06 (status=inconsistency_flagged): KPI metric discrepancy for OBJ-7 — Impact section B.2.1/B.2.2 states technology transfer via >=2 EDIHs where canonical OBJ-7 measurable_target specifies >=3 EDIHs; Impact section also omits the TEF validation target (>=2 TEFs) present in Excellence B.1.1. CC-09 (status=inconsistency_flagged): terminology inconsistency — Impact section B.2.1 PATH-EI-04 uses 'Neuro-symbolic planning framework for LLM-based agents' where canonical Tier 3 OBJ-1 title and Excellence B.1.1/B.1.2 consistently use 'Neuro-symbolic planning engine'. Two blocking cross-section inconsistencies must be resolved before assembled draft is cleared.
